title: Pot - Optimized
description: The Best Ressource Pack for Pot.
body:
# Pot - Optimized

_**This resource pack was created with the goal of providing the best Pot PvP experience.**_

**This Pack modifies the following items/particules:**

> **The Knockback Diamond Sword has the texture of a stick.**

> **New Glint & Armor/Weapons/Pot** _(Release)_

> **All Particle got removed.** _(Release)_

> **A New crosshair has been set.**

> **The Sun/Moon has been removed is the sky.**

> **Preview Video** _(Release)_

### Preview Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yGmUgsthuQo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**_This pack is not only made for survival between friends, it is also made to play in multiplayer on servers pratice like._**

> **SwiftPvP** _(eu.swiftpvp.xyz)_

> **LokaMC** _(lokamc.com)_

> **PvPClub** 

> **FadedMC**

> **MetalMC**

**_This Resource Pack is compatible with all other resource packs, you just need to put it in the first line of resource packs for it to work._**

**_Using this pack, yKoseli got High Tier 4 on Diamond Pot.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a7d6fdac3b3727b7017b7e6860c2a99ea5cb6d8_0.webp)

# PotOptimized By yKoseli
